api_proxy_type.description: Specifies the type of API proxy deployed in the Apigee environment; must be either 'proxy' or 'sharedflow'.

deployment_type.description: Specifies the type of deployment for the Apigee environment, such as 'PRODUCTION' or 'TEST', which determines the environment's use case and behavior.

description.description: Specifies the description for the Apigee environment, providing context or details about its purpose; must not exceed 255 characters.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for the Apigee environment, used for identification and display purposes.

forward_proxy_uri.description: Specifies the URI of the forward proxy to route API requests through, if applicable. Must include the protocol (http or https).

name.description: Name of the Apigee environment. Must be unique within the Apigee organization.

node_config.description: Specifies the configuration for the Apigee environment's nodes, including size and count, to control the deployment capacity.

org_id.description: ID of the Apigee organization to which the environment belongs.

properties.description: Specifies the key-value pairs for configuring environment-level properties in Apigee. Must be a valid JSON object.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for operations related to the Apigee environment, such as create, update, or delete, with values specified in Terraform's timeout block.

type.description: Defines the type of environment, such as "PROD" or "TEST", used for managing API proxies within Apigee.
